task_text: portal-migration-srilu — migrate static SMB-Agents portfolio portal from main-vps (nginx :8080 /portal/) to srilu (python http.server :8080). Single static HTML file under /opt/triveni/portal/ + systemd unit + deploy script extension. New URL: http://89.167.116.187:8080/. main-vps portal stays running until srilu deploy is verified (slowly-decommission pattern). Per option-A discipline: minimum viable substrate (python stdlib http.server) — avoids installing nginx on multi-tenant box. No new schema, no LLM, no audit chain.
